nodes.label: PersonalKM Note Health Check & Auto-Recovery System
nodes.rationale: Raw notes captured via LINE Bot can have pre-ingestion quality issues (partial extraction, generic/empty summary, missing tags, blocked platform) before weekly ingestion turns raw/ into wiki/. This system scans raw/ notes weekly (Tuesday 10:00 UTC+8) to detect and auto-repair those issues, deliberately scoped to raw/ note quality so it complements rather than duplicates bot/ingestion_health_check.py (post-ingestion wiki integrity) and scripts/sanity_check.py (on-demand frontmatter repair).
nodes.norm_label: personalkm note health check & auto-recovery system

nodes.label: personalkm-health-check cron job (Job ID 1b058c7b65a9, blocked on OpenRouter credits)
nodes.norm_label: personalkm-health-check cron job (job id 1b058c7b65a9, blocked on openrouter credits)

nodes.label: PersonalKM Bot (git commit author identity for ingestion commits)
nodes.norm_label: personalkm bot (git commit author identity for ingestion commits)

nodes.label: Why Raw, Not Inbox (design decision)
nodes.rationale: Incoming LINE notes go directly to raw/<Category>/<date>-<seq>-<slug>.md rather than staging in an Inbox/ folder first. Chosen over an Inbox approach for: lower capture latency (immediately available for ingestion vs waiting for manual triage), single-hop lineage (raw->wiki vs Inbox->raw->wiki), a single source of truth for idempotency/duplicate checks, a 'system handles it automatically' user mental model instead of 'I need to do something with this', and a safer failure mode (weekly ingestion processes everything vs an Inbox silently filling up and being forgotten). A two-stage Inbox->raw->wiki system was rejected as added complexity (two directories, two move operations) without clear benefit for a capture-and-forget workflow.

nodes.label: ContentQualityChecker (classifies low-quality notes, moves to archive/ instead of wiki)
nodes.norm_label: contentqualitychecker (classifies low-quality notes, moves to archive/ instead of wiki)

nodes.label: Knowledge Decay System
nodes.rationale: Automated detection of outdated DevOps/AI knowledge in the vault: a real-time decay check runs on every note capture (classifies DevOps/AI relevance, extracts version numbers, flags outdated practices with a deprecation notice) plus a monthly decay report (1st of month) that categorizes all DevOps/AI notes as CRITICAL(6+ months)/HIGH(4-6 months)/MEDIUM(3-4 months)/EVERGREEN(0-3 months) using a 3-month freshness threshold. Outdated notes are flagged, not deleted, so they remain available for reference while surfacing what needs updating.

nodes.label: bot/app.py (modified to call analyze_on_capture on every note)
nodes.norm_label: bot/app.py (modified to call analyze_on_capture on every note)

nodes.label: Option B Deployment — LLM-Wiki Ingestion v2 (Phase 3)
nodes.rationale: Gradual rollout of ingestion v2 (enhanced 8-field LLM-Wiki frontmatter, auto-maintained index.md/log.md, automatic wikilinks, regenerated knowledge-graph.md) to production. Included a safety backup (git tag safety-pre-v2-deployment) and kept ingestion_v1.py in Git as a fallback so the rollout could be reverted (3 documented rollback options) without data loss. Chose a monitored, 3-week gradual rollout over an all-at-once switch to reduce risk to the weekly ingestion pipeline.
nodes.norm_label: option b deployment — llm-wiki ingestion v2 (phase 3)

nodes.norm_label: render.yaml: personal-km-weekly-ingestion cron (sat 23:00 utc / sun 07:00 utc+8)

nodes.label: PersonalKM + Hermes Agent Enrichment Integration (auto-deploy)
nodes.rationale: AI note enrichment (auto-tagging + one-line summary via OpenAI gpt-4o-mini) added to the LINE capture pipeline. Implemented as a non-blocking call so enrichment failures never break note capture. Paired with enabling Render autoDeploy so every push to main deploys automatically, removing the need for a manual dashboard deploy step.

nodes.label: Quality Filtering Deliverable
nodes.rationale: 11/284 raw files (3.9%) archived as low-quality stubs; reversible via archive/ so wiki stays clean without data loss.

nodes.label: Auto-Retry Deliverable
nodes.rationale: 10 retries over ~100 minutes so ingestion recovers automatically from transient OpenAI client outages without manual reruns.

nodes.rationale: Auto-tags and summarizes captured notes non-blockingly so the vault self-organizes as it grows instead of staying unorganized without manual tagging.

nodes.label: Status Reporting Gap & Health Check Solution
nodes.rationale: Prior status reports trusted memory/logs instead of actual filesystem state, causing false 'success' reports when ingestion silently failed (0 wiki files created despite claiming 273 processed); solved by always running independent verification.
nodes.norm_label: status reporting gap & health check solution

nodes.label: LINE Bot + Obsidian Link Organization System
nodes.rationale: Render+GitHub durable queue+Obsidian Git+Mac mini worker chosen because Render handles the real-time LINE webhook without needing Mac mini always on; GitHub gives version-controlled durable storage; Obsidian syncs via Git without direct connection to Render/Mac mini; Mac mini only runs low-cost heavy local recovery (e.g. YouTube transcription) when powered on, at zero incremental cost. Principle: save everything completely first, then progressively enrich; cloud handles real-time reliability, local handles cheap heavy compute.

nodes.label: Documentation Governance Process
nodes.rationale: Introduced to stop root .md files accumulating completed one-off reports; classifies docs into Active/Changelog/Backlog/Generated Reports/Knowledge Notes tiers with explicit removal criteria and a monthly review cadence.

nodes.label: ContentQualityChecker (Automated Trash System)
nodes.rationale: Raw notes captured via LINE include stub/placeholder content (Reddit verification walls, loading pages, sub-100-char captures) that add noise without meaningful content; ContentQualityChecker filters these out before ingestion while never permanently deleting data (moved to archive/, fully reversible and audited).

nodes.label: No Visibility & No Auto-Recovery Problem
nodes.rationale: Cron jobs ran silently with no real-time feedback and no retry on intermittent OpenAI API failures, forcing manual weekly re-runs; solved via a RunningLog class for step-by-step audit trail plus an auto-retry mechanism for resilience.

nodes.label: LLM Wiki v2 — Enhanced Ingestion Pipeline Plan
nodes.rationale: Goal: distill raw captures into readable summaries, dedupe entities to one page each, and add bidirectional wikilinks so the vault becomes a knowledge graph instead of a file pile.
nodes.norm_label: llm wiki v2 — enhanced ingestion pipeline plan

nodes.label: launchd Scheduled Runner (15-min interval, one note per run, lock dir)
nodes.rationale: Deliberately conservative — one pending note per run, lock directory to avoid overlap, skips if repo has uncommitted changes — to keep cost at zero while preserving the repo as durable queue when Mac mini is offline.
